creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 208860
svn(1) diff against the ports tree

This will be used in an upgraded version of devel/lua-luacheck, which separates out argparse from luacheck as argparse is now used in other projects as well.

Doesn't do any building, just plucking out of the src tree, so not much Q/A needed/done.

Glanced over by: portlint (-cAC)
Tested with:  Poudriere (amd64, -CURRENT)
